title: The Crew Reaches Robin
description: Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.
scene: Across pages 0, 1, 2, 3, this part follows Luffy, Nico Robin, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: This certifies that you're a scholar.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Ohara Library, Head Librarian (Archaeologist) Dr. Professor Clover

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Remember well what being an archae-ologist means!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You....!! How do you know that!?

summary: Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.
